title: 大阪杯の後に・消えぬ景色

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove put her best foot forward in the
Osaka Hai. Afterwards, in the waiting room...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This race was another step towards taking on
Suzuka. The question is, where will she be next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Someone of Silence Suzuka's talents would
probably run in...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. There's no doubt in my mind that's where
she'll choose to run next.
choice_data_list:
We'll do even better in the Takarazuka Kinen
than today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That we will. I'll definitely defeat Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove begins to pack her things, but
something seems off about her...
